channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Business garbage not collected, 4th May
item.description:
At least 10 commercial garbage bags (orange-ish) have been dumped in the street for a week. Animals have broken the bags a spread the rubbish. The bags are almost opposite to Buns from Home
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Cut, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Empty pond, 4th May
item.description:
Please fix inflow of water to pond. The park is looking awful and is attracting anti social behaviour and graffiti because it is not a nice place to be anymore. Please set a side funding to fix the pond and clear the muck
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 4th May
item.description:
Dumped rubbish on the grass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22A,22B,22C,22D, Sholden Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle parked in wrong place, 4th May
item.description:
This vehicle has been left in the wrong parking place or has been abandoned it has been left on the corner of Doyle close for nearly 3 weeks now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Doyle Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very overgrown bush obstucting pavement, 4th May
item.description:
This is causing children to walk into the rd on a very tight corner on way to school . Cars come around that corner quick only a matter of time till someone is hit or killed by a car

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middle Park Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Access gate open under bridge, 4th May
item.description:
Access gate left unlocked. Access can be gained via uplands Road, Woodford bridge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M11, Woodford Bridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Oven left on side of the road by tree, 4th May
item.description:
Large electrical item (oven) has been fly tipped outside 4 Carver Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carver Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothes containers, 4th May
item.description:
We would like to report an ongoing issue with the large clothes recycling containers located on Clarence Avenue in Lambeth. Unfortunately, these containers are being consistently vandalised, often by individuals struggling with drug addiction or homelessness. As a result, clothing is frequently scattered across the street, creating an unsanitary and unpleasant environment for residents. In addition, many of these clothes are being taken into the three tower blocks nearby and left in communal areas, including the gardens and lower ground floors. This situation has become a persistent problem for the local community. We kindly request that Lambeth Council consider removing these clothes recycling containers to prevent further disruption and maintain a cleaner, safer environment for residents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Clarence Avenue, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mixed items dumped on street, 4th May
item.description:
Tree branches, garden waste, bags of clothes snd loose clothes, along with black bags piled on top of one another. This is a serious problem. Please make sure all items are collected. It’s awful.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead rooting fox by graves at bottom of cemetery near tress along from old shed, 4th May
item.description:
Dead fox on grave at bottom of cemetery
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mayday Gardens, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and overflowing bins, 4th May
item.description:
Awful fly tipping and overflowing bins, encouraging pests. This issue needs to be sorted out long term.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rectory Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavememt, 4th May

Rubbish is dumped, black bags and other items. The bags are torn and rubbish is spreading
